name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability, metric, or improvement

---

<!-- Keep it short. The problem matters more than a fully-formed solution. -->

## The problem

What are you trying to do that dataprof makes hard or impossible today?

## What you'd like

The behaviour or API you have in mind. A rough sketch is fine.

## Alternatives / workarounds

Anything you've tried or considered instead.

## Anything else

Related issues, prior art, or context.
